entries.title: A disclosure from Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh details immense financial holdings that suggest a net worth of at least tens of millions of dollars

Before taking office, RFK Jr. promised to end what he dubbed the FDA’s “aggressive suppression” of raw milk. Now leading the HHS, he has pivoted to the politically safer choice of whole milk.
